nasb.text: In the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month at evening, you shall eat unleavened bread, until the twenty-first day of the month at evening.

esv.text: In the first month, from the fourteenth day of the month at evening, you shall eat unleavened bread until the twenty-first day of the month at evening.

cnv.text: 從正月十四日晚上起，直到本月二十一日晚上止，你們要吃無酵餅。

ccb.text: 从一月十四日晚上开始，直到二十一日晚上，你们都要吃无酵饼。
